title: My Work 1000 item limit- workaround?

posts.author: flip904 (Jacob K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to set up workaround for the 1000 item limit in My Work?

Support told me to have items with “done” status move to another board- not good solution.

Would it be possible to:

When item status changes (done)
Remove person from Assigned

This would solve about half the issue (done items count toward the 1000 item limit)

The next step would be to somehow delay assigning the person to item, which would effectively decrease the # of items in my work at any given time.

None of this is ideal but it seems we have to get creative using Monday

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s exactly what I do

image1347×546 16.1 KB

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Your idea about removing the assignee when an item is marked as done is clever and could help a lot. For the delay in assigning items, you might consider using automations or integrations that can help stagger assignments.
